ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene (e.g., ABL1, ACVR1) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type (e.g., PANCAN, UCEC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cancer type */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* The incidence rate of the cancer type */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* The mortality rate of the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_types" (
  "driver_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver type */,
  "driver_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver type (e.g., oncogene, tumor suppressor gene) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the driver type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_genes" (
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver gene */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "driver_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver type */,
  "consensus_score" REAL /* Consensus score of the driver gene */,
  "correlation_adjusted_score" REAL /* Correlation-adjusted score of the driver gene */,
  "novel" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the driver gene is novel */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* The type of mutation (e.g., SNV, CNV, SV) */,
  "mutation_count" INTEGER /* The number of mutations observed in the driver gene */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the driver gene information was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* The primary source of the driver gene data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_genes_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_genes_driver_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_type_id") REFERENCES driver_types ("driver_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissue_frequencies" (
  "tissue_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue frequency */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue (e.g., lung, breast) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the driver gene in the tissue */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The number of samples used to calculate the frequency */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the frequency data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tissue_frequencies_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pancan_frequencies" (
  "pancan_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pan-cancer frequency */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Pan-cancer frequency of the driver gene */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The number of samples used to calculate the pan-cancer frequency */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the pan-cancer frequency data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pancan_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pancan_frequencies_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rescue_notes" (
  "rescue_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rescue note */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Rescue notes for the driver gene */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* The date when the rescue note was added */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* The user who added the rescue note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rescue_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rescue_notes_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "previous_publications" (
  "previous_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each previous publication */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about previous publications for the driver gene */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* The date when the publication note was added */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* The user who added the publication note */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* The PubMed ID or other reference identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("previous_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_previous_publications_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the driver gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation for the driver gene */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* The date when the annotation was added */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* The user who added the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the integration (e.g., TCGA, OncoImpact) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the integration (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the integration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue (e.g., lung, breast) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tissue */,
  "anatomical_site" TEXT /* The anatomical site of the tissue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_gene_tissues" (
  "driver_gene_tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver gene-tissue relationship */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue */,
  "frequency" REAL /* The frequency of the driver gene in the tissue */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The number of samples used to calculate the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_gene_tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_gene_tissues_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_gene_tissues_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_type_driver_genes" (
  "cancer_type_driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type-driver gene relationship */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "frequency" REAL /* The frequency of the driver gene in the cancer type */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The number of samples used to calculate the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_driver_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_type_driver_genes_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_type_driver_genes_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_drivers" (
  "gene_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-driver type relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "driver_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver type */,
  "evidence_level" TEXT /* The level of evidence supporting the driver type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_drivers_driver_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_type_id") REFERENCES driver_types ("driver_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_drivers_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., TCGA, OncoImpact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_gene_data_sources" (
  "driver_gene_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver gene-data source relationship */,
  "driver_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver gene */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* The version of the data source from which the data was integrated */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* The status of the data integration (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_gene_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_gene_data_sources_driver_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_gene_id") REFERENCES driver_genes ("driver_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_gene_data_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
